description: Task Precedence Graph for PT (Penlight) gear-box assembly (HA-ViD case study).

tasks.sftg1ws: Screw Shaft into Gear Hole 1 using Wrench-Shaft
tasks.sftg2ws: Screw Shaft into Gear Hole 2 using Wrench-Shaft
tasks.sspg3: Screw Phillips Screw into Gear Hole 3
tasks.sspg3dp: Screw Phillips Screw into Gear Hole 3 using Phillips Screwdriver
tasks.pgwg3: Place Worm Gear onto Gear Hole 3
tasks.sntf1wn: Screw Nut onto Shaft 1 using Wrench-Nut
tasks.sntf2wn: Screw Nut onto Shaft 2 using Wrench-Nut

notes: Three parallel entry chains, each starting from an independent root node: Chain 1 (sftg1â†’sftg1wsâ†’iplf1â†’iglf1â†’ipsf1â†’sntf1â†’sntf1wnâ†’rgw), Chain 2 (sftg2â†’sftg2wsâ†’iplf2â†’igsf2â†’ipsf2â†’sntf2â†’sntf2wnâ†’rgw), Chain 3 (pgwg3â†’sspg3â†’sspg3dpâ†’rgw). Root nodes with no prerequisites: sftg1, sftg2, pgwg3. All three chains converge at rgw (Rotate Worm Gear) as the final verification step.
